opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have these red, itchy circles spreading all over my stomach and back, and they are getting bigger by the hour.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Itchy ring-shaped patches are spreading on my trunk and I'm worried about it and passing it to my kids.

symptom_narrative.onset: 3 days ago as a small patch, now several rings
symptom_narrative.character: itchy ring-shaped red patches with a scaly raised edge and clearer centre
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: tummy and back and one upper arm (asymmetric)
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: clear centres with active scaly edges; contact with a new kitten 2 weeks ago; NO fever, no boggy painful lumps, no scalp involvement

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with family/children; new kitten (likely zoonotic source)

objective_data_offered.value: several annular red patches with a raised scaly edge and central clearing on the trunk/arm, visible on video
no fever, no boggy painful lumps, no scalp patches
